sections.title: Base
sections.odds: 100 cards. Serial numbered #/75. · PARALLEL CARDS: Silver #/25, Gold #/10, Emerald #/5, Platinum 1/1, Printing Plates 1/1.

sections.title: Elegance Rookie Helmet and Patch Autos
sections.odds: 40 cards. Serial numbered #/75. · PARALLEL CARDS: Helmet/Nameplate #/25, Helmet/Glove #/15, NFL Logo 1/1.

sections.title: Rookie Autographs
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Red #/49, Silver #/25, Gold #/10, Emerald #/5, Platinum 1/1, Printing Plates 1/1. · *Troy Fumagalli not in base; Tanner Lee only in Platinum parallel; Auden Tate only in Emerald/Platinum/Plates parallels.

sections.title: Extravagance Patch Autos Platinum
sections.odds: 15 cards. Serial numbered 1/1. · PARALLEL CARDS: Printing Plates 1/1.

sections.title: Impeccable Victory Platinum
sections.odds: 32 cards. Serial numbered 1/1. · PARALLEL CARDS: Printing Plates 1/1 (No Tom Brady*).

sections.title: Jerseys
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Silver #/25 or #/10 (No Tate*), Gold #/10 or #/5, Platinum 1/1, Printing Plates 1/1.
